scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send: OPTIONS sips:sibtel.bbg.gv.at SIP/2.0 From: <sips:0@sibtel.bbg.gv.at>;tag=7357aa5a-c2ec-4563-be9b-acad54ad1693 To: <sips:0@sibtel.bbg.gv.at> Call-ID: eeb981b2-a2f1-47cf-b784-641153693b49 CSeq: 1 OPTIONS Max-Forwards: 70 Via: SIP/2.0/TLS 192.168.0.206:51005;branch=z9hG4bK252579ca-34f0-4e99-923b-3650771ac73d Supported: eventlist,outbound,replaces Allow: INVITE,ACK,OPTIONS,BYE,CANCEL,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,REFER,INFO,PUBLISH,UPDATE User-Agent: Avaya Communicator/3.0 (3.7.6.10.1; Avaya CSDK; Microsoft Windows NT 6.2.9200.0) Contact: <sips:0@192.168.0.206:51005>;+sip.instance="<urn:uuid:ee85e6c9-06eb-4537-95bd-518cad463db1>";+av.sip.iptolerance;+av.sip.sig=4 Content-Length: 0

SUBSCRIBE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[field0]@[field1]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[field1]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 SUBSCRIBE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 Event: presence Expires: 60 Accept: application/pidf+xml Allow-Events: presence Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 200 OK Via:[$7] From:[field1] <sip:[field1]@[field3]>;[$9] To:[field0] <sip:[field0]@[field3]>;[$10] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 11 NOTIFY Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Length: 0 Expires: 60 Max-Forwards: 70

SUBSCRIBE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[field0]@[field1]>;[$10] To: <sip:[field0]@[field1]>;[$9] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 SUBSCRIBE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 Event: presence Expires: 60 Accept: application/pidf+xml Allow-Events: presence Content-Length: 0
